user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Coca-Cola
Product type: Original classic beverage
Tone: refreshing, nostalgic, authentic
Visual style: Bold red and white color palette with classic typography and vibrant, energetic imagery that evokes happiness and togetherness.
Conceptual technique: emotional storytelling centered on shared moments and timeless enjoyment
Format: image

brief.headline: Pop the Happiness
brief.caption: A group of diverse friends laughing and sharing stories around a picnic table, each with a classic glass bottle of Coca-Cola, as the sun sets over a vibrant park scene.
brief.visual_style: Bold red and white color palette with classic typography and vibrant, energetic imagery that evokes happiness and togetherness.
brief.conceptual_technique: emotional storytelling centered on shared moments and timeless enjoyment
brief.typography_style: Vintage-inspired bold script for brand logo, paired with clean sans-serif body text
brief.color_scheme: iconic Coca-Cola red, crisp white, and natural outdoor greens
